L1_headline: + ESPR – Sheldon L. Koenig files to sell 48,244 shares. | 12/17/25
L2_brief: Sheldon L. Koenig, an Officer and Director of Esperion Therapeutics, filed to sell 48,244 shares of common stock valued at approximately $177,200. The sale is related to covering tax obligations from recently vested restricted stock, representing a routine compensation-related transaction rather than discretionary selling.

risks_flagged: Recent prior sale of 28,427 shares on 09/17/2025 for $79,240.27
